data_directory.description: Directory where data will be saved to
data_directory.title: Data Directory

triggered_camera_controller.description: Required camera controller to triggered cameras.

monitoring_camera_controller.description: Optional camera controller for monitoring cameras.

AindDynamicForagingTaskLogic.description:
Main task logic model for the AIND Dynamic Foraging task.

This is the top-level class that encapsulates the complete task logic
specification for the dynamic foraging behavioral experiment.
It includes all task parameters, environment specifications, and control settings.

stage_name.description: Optional stage name the `Task` object instance represents.
stage_name.title: Stage Name

AindDynamicForagingTaskLogic.title: AindDynamicForagingTaskLogic

AindDynamicForagingTaskParameters.description:
Complete parameter specification for the AIND Dynamic Foraging task.

This class contains all configurable parameters for the Dynamic Foraging task,
including environment structure, task mode settings, operation control,
and numerical updaters for dynamic parameter modification.

rng_seed.description: Seed of the random number generator
rng_seed.title: Rng Seed

trial_generator.description: Trial generator model for generating trials in the task.

AindDynamicForagingTaskParameters.title: AindDynamicForagingTaskParameters

full_step_to_mm.title: Full step to mm. Used to convert steps to SI Units

axis_configuration.title: Axes configuration. Only the axes that are configured will be enabled.

min_ignored_trials.description: Minimum consecutive ignored trials before auto water is triggered.
min_ignored_trials.title: Min Ignored Trials

min_unrewarded_trials.description: Minimum consecutive unrewarded trials before auto water is triggered.
min_unrewarded_trials.title: Min Unrewarded Trials

reward_fraction.description: Fraction of full reward volume delivered during auto water (0=none, 1=full).
reward_fraction.title: Reward Fraction

step_acceleration_interval.description: Acceleration of the step interval in microseconds
step_acceleration_interval.title: Acceleration

maximum_step_interval.title: Configures the time between step motor pulses (us) used when starting or stopping a movement

max_limit.title: Maximum limit in SI units. A value of 0 disables this limit.

min_limit.title: Minimum limit in SI units. A value of 0 disables this limit.

BehaviorStabilityParameters.description: Parameters controlling when behavior is considered stable enough to switch blocks.

behavior_evaluation_mode.description: When to evaluate stability — at the end of the block (end) or at any point during the block (anytime).
behavior_evaluation_mode.title: Behavior Evaluation Mode

behavior_stability_fraction.description: Fraction scaling reward-probability difference for behavior.
behavior_stability_fraction.title: Behavior Stability Fraction

min_consecutive_stable_trials.description: Minimum number of consecutive trials satisfying the behavioral stability fraction.
min_consecutive_stable_trials.title: Min Consecutive Stable Trials

BehaviorStabilityParameters.title: BehaviorStabilityParameters

BetaDistribution.description:
A beta probability distribution.

Continuous distribution bounded between 0 and 1. Commonly used
for modeling probabilities and proportions.
BetaDistribution.title: BetaDistribution

BetaDistributionParameters.description:
Parameters for a beta distribution.

Defined by alpha and beta shape parameters.
BetaDistributionParameters.title: BetaDistributionParameters

BinomialDistribution.description:
A binomial probability distribution.

Models the number of successes in a fixed number of independent
Bernoulli trials with constant success probability.
BinomialDistribution.title: BinomialDistribution

BinomialDistributionParameters.description:
Parameters for a binomial distribution.

Defined by number of trials (n) and success probability (p).
BinomialDistributionParameters.title: BinomialDistributionParameters

frame_rate.description: Frame rate of the trigger to all cameras
frame_rate.title: Frame Rate

frame_rate.description: Frame rate of the trigger to all cameras
frame_rate.title: Frame Rate

target_device.description: Optional device name to provide user additional information
target_device.title: Target Device

CoupledTrialGenerationEndConditions.description: Defines the conditions under which a foraging session should terminate.

ignore_win.description: Number of recent trials to check for ignored responses.
ignore_win.title: Ignore Win

ignore_ratio_threshold.description: Maximum fraction of ignored trials within the window before the session is ended.
ignore_ratio_threshold.title: Ignore Ratio Threshold

max_trial.description: Maximum number of trials allowed in a session.
max_trial.title: Max Trial

CoupledTrialGenerationEndConditions.title: CoupledTrialGenerationEndConditions

quiescent_duration.description: Distribution describing the quiescence period before trial starts (in seconds). Each lick resets the timer.

response_duration.description: Duration after go cue for animal response.
response_duration.title: Response Duration

reward_consumption_duration.description: Duration of reward consumption before transition to ITI (in seconds).
reward_consumption_duration.title: Reward Consumption Duration

inter_trial_interval_duration.description: Distribution describing the inter-trial interval (in seconds).

min_block_reward.title: Minimal rewards in a block to switch

reward_probability_parameters.description: Parameters defining the reward probability structure.

autowater_parameters.description: Auto water settings. If set, free water is delivered when the animal exceeds the ignored or unrewarded trial thresholds.

is_baiting.description: Whether uncollected rewards carry over to the next trial.
is_baiting.title: Is Baiting

behavior_stability_parameters.description: Parameters controlling behavior-dependent block switching. If None, block switches rely only on length and reward criteria.

extend_block_on_no_response.description: Whether to extend the minimum block length by one trial when the animal does not respond.
extend_block_on_no_response.title: Extend Block On No Response

DynamicForagingSoundCard.description: A calibrated sound card for the dynamic foraging rig. This is a subclass of the HarpSoundCard that includes the sound card calibration.
DynamicForagingSoundCard.title: DynamicForagingSoundCard

ExponentialDistribution.description:
An exponential probability distribution.

Models time between events in a Poisson process. Commonly used
for wait times and inter-event intervals.
ExponentialDistribution.title: ExponentialDistribution

ExponentialDistributionParameters.description:
Parameters for an exponential distribution.

Defined by the rate parameter (inverse of mean).
ExponentialDistributionParameters.title: ExponentialDistributionParameters

GammaDistribution.description:
A gamma probability distribution.

Generalizes the exponential distribution. Used for modeling
positive continuous variables with right-skewed distributions.
GammaDistribution.title: GammaDistribution

GammaDistributionParameters.description:
Parameters for a gamma distribution.

Defined by shape (k) and rate (θ⁻¹) parameters.
GammaDistributionParameters.title: GammaDistributionParameters

LogNormalDistribution.description:
A log-normal probability distribution.

Distribution where the logarithm of the variable is normally distributed.
Always produces positive values and is right-skewed.
LogNormalDistribution.title: LogNormalDistribution

LogNormalDistributionParameters.description:
Parameters for a log-normal distribution.

Defined by the mean and standard deviation of the underlying normal distribution.
LogNormalDistributionParameters.title: LogNormalDistributionParameters

ManipulatorPosition.description: Represents a position in the manipulator coordinate system
ManipulatorPosition.title: ManipulatorPosition

Measurement.description: Input for water valve calibration class

valve_open_interval.description: Time between two consecutive valve openings (s)
valve_open_interval.title: Valve open interval

repeat_count.description: Number of times the valve opened.
repeat_count.title: Repeat count

Measurement.title: Measurement

NormalDistribution.description:
A normal (Gaussian) probability distribution.

Bell-shaped distribution symmetric around the mean, commonly used
for modeling naturally occurring random variables.
NormalDistribution.title: NormalDistribution

NormalDistributionParameters.description:
Parameters for a normal (Gaussian) distribution.

Defined by mean (center) and standard deviation (spread).
NormalDistributionParameters.title: NormalDistributionParameters

PdfDistribution.description:
A custom probability density function distribution.

Allows defining arbitrary discrete distributions by specifying
probability values and their corresponding indices.
PdfDistribution.title: PdfDistribution

PdfDistributionParameters.description:
Parameters for a custom probability density function distribution.

Defined by explicit probability values and their corresponding indices.
Probabilities are automatically normalized to sum to 1.

index.description: The index of the probability density function
index.title: Index

PdfDistributionParameters.title: PdfDistributionParameters

PoissonDistribution.description:
A Poisson probability distribution.

Models the number of events occurring in a fixed interval of time or space
when events occur independently at a constant rate.
PoissonDistribution.title: PoissonDistribution

PoissonDistributionParameters.description:
Parameters for a Poisson distribution.

Defined by the rate parameter (average number of events).

rate.description: Rate parameter of the Poisson process that generates the distribution
rate.title: Rate

PoissonDistributionParameters.title: PoissonDistributionParameters

QuickRetractSettings.description: Settings for the quick retract feature.

enable_during_quiescence.description: If true, the quick retract feature is enabled during the quiescence period.
enable_during_quiescence.title: Enable During Quiescence

time_to_reset_during_quiescence.description: If enable_during_quiescence is true, this is the time the spout will take to reset. If the quiescence period is shorter than this time, the spout will retract at the end of the period.

enable_on_response.description: If true, the quick retract feature is enabled immediately after a response is registered.
enable_on_response.title: Enable On Response

QuickRetractSettings.title: QuickRetractSettings

Rect.description: Represents a rectangle defined by its top-left corner, width, and height.

x.description: X coordinate of the top-left corner
x.title: X

y.description: Y coordinate of the top-left corner
y.title: Y

Rect.title: Rect

RewardProbabilityParameters.description:
Defines the reward probability structure for a dynamic foraging task.

Reward probabilities are defined as pairs (p_left, p_right) normalized by
base_reward_sum. Pairs are drawn from a family representing a difficulty level:

    Family 1:   [[8, 1], [6, 1], [3, 1], [1, 1]]
    Family 2:  [[8, 1], [1, 1]]
    Family 3:  [[1.0, 0.0], [0.9, 0.1], [0.8, 0.2], [0.7, 0.3], [0.6, 0.4], [0.5, 0.5]]
    Family 4:  [[6, 1], [3, 1], [1, 1]]

base_reward_sum.description: Total reward probability shared between the two sides. Each reward pair is normalized to sum to this value.
base_reward_sum.title: Base Reward Sum

reward_pairs.description: List of (left, right) reward ratio pairs to sample from during block transitions.
reward_pairs.title: Reward Pairs

RewardProbabilityParameters.title: RewardProbabilityParameters

RigCalibration.description: Container class for calibration models. In a future release these will be moved to the respective devices
RigCalibration.title: RigCalibration

Scalar.description:
A scalar distribution that returns a constant value.

Useful for fixed parameters that don't vary across trials or samples.
Scalar.title: Scalar

ScalarDistributionParameter.description:
Parameters for a scalar (constant) distribution.

Represents a deterministic value that always returns the same number.

value.description: The static value of the distribution
value.title: Value

ScalarDistributionParameter.title: ScalarDistributionParameter

ScalingParameters.description:
Parameters for scaling and offsetting sampled distribution values.
Scaling is applied as (value * scale + offset).

Applies linear transformation: result = (value * scale) + offset.

scale.description: Scaling factor to apply on the sampled distribution
scale.title: Scale

offset.description: Offset factor to apply on the sampled distribution
offset.title: Offset

ScalingParameters.title: ScalingParameters

session_name.description: Name of the session. This will be used to create a folder in the root path. If not provided, it will be generated using subject and date.
session_name.title: Session Name

allow_dirty_repo.description: Allow running from a dirty repository
allow_dirty_repo.title: Allow Dirty Repo

go_cue.description: Waveform to play for go cue

cs_plus.description: Waveform to play for CS+ cue

cs_minus.description: Waveform to play for CS- cue

SoundCardCalibration.title: SoundCardCalibration

gamma.description: Gamma. If None, will disable gamma correction.
gamma.title: Gamma

adc_bit_depth.description: ADC bit depth. If None will be left as default.

video_writer.description: Video writer. If not provided, no video will be saved.

Trial.description: Represents a single trial that can be instantiated by the Bonsai state machine.

p_reward_left.description: The probability of reward on the left side if response is made.
p_reward_left.title: P Reward Left

p_reward_right.description: The probability of reward on the right side if response is made.
p_reward_right.title: P Reward Right

reward_consumption_duration.description: Duration of reward consumption before transition to ITI (in seconds).
reward_consumption_duration.title: Reward Consumption Duration

reward_delay_duration.description: Delay before reward is delivered after the secondary reinforcer (in seconds).
reward_delay_duration.title: Reward Delay Duration

secondary_reinforcer.description: Defines the secondary reinforcer used in the trial.

response_deadline_duration.description: Time allowed for the subject to make a response (in seconds).
response_deadline_duration.title: Response Deadline Duration

quick_retract_settings.description: Settings for the quick retract feature. If null, the feature will be disabled for this trial.

quiescence_period_duration.description: Duration of the quiescence period before trial starts (in seconds). Each lick resets the timer.
quiescence_period_duration.title: Quiescence Period Duration

inter_trial_interval_duration.description: Duration of the inter-trial interval (in seconds).
inter_trial_interval_duration.title: Inter Trial Interval Duration

is_auto_response_right.description: If set, the trial will automatically (and immediately) register a response to the right (True) or left (False).
is_auto_response_right.title: Is Auto Response Right

lickspout_offset_delta.description: Horizontal delta offset of the lickspouts (in mm) applied in this trial. Positive values move the lickspouts right.
lickspout_offset_delta.title: Lickspout Offset Delta

extra_metadata.description: Additional metadata to include with the trial. This field will NOT be used or validated by the task engine.
extra_metadata.title: Extra Metadata

Trial.title: Trial

generators.description: List of trial generator specifications to concatenate. When one generator returns None, the next one is concatenated.
generators.title: Generators

TrialOutcome.description: Represents the outcome of a single trial.

trial.description: The trial associated with this outcome.

is_right_choice.description: Reports the choice made by the subject. True for right, False for left, None for no choice.
is_right_choice.title: Is Right Choice

is_rewarded.description: Indicates whether the subject received a reward on this trial.
is_rewarded.title: Is Rewarded

TrialOutcome.title: TrialOutcome

TruncationParameters.description:
Parameters for truncating a distribution to a specified range. Truncation should
be applied after sampling and scaling.

The truncation_mode determines how out-of-bounds values are handled:
- "exclude": Resample until a value within [min, max] is obtained.
If after a certain number of attempts no valid value is found, it
will use the average of sampled values and pick the closest bound.
- "clamp": Clamp values to the nearest bound within [min, max].
Used to constrain sampled values within minimum and maximum bounds.

min.description: Minimum value of the sampled distribution
min.title: Min

max.description: Maximum value of the sampled distribution
max.title: Max

TruncationParameters.title: TruncationParameters

UniformDistribution.description:
A uniform probability distribution.

All values between min and max have equal probability of being sampled.
UniformDistribution.title: UniformDistribution

UniformDistributionParameters.description:
Parameters for a uniform distribution.

Defined by minimum and maximum bounds of the distribution.
UniformDistributionParameters.title: UniformDistributionParameters
